title: How to Approach BDD with Conformiq Visualizer
summary: A practical guide to implementing Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) using Conformiq Visualizer. Introduces the '3 Amigos' collaboration model — uniting business, development, and QA — and walks through writing Gherkin scenarios, building BPMN models, generating automated test cases, and integrating with ALM tools like Jira, GitHub, and Azure DevOps.
pdfPath: /projects/blogs/conformiq/How to Approach BDD with Conformiq Visualizer.pdf
highlights: '3 Amigos' framework: aligning business, development, and QA through shared Given-When-Then scenarios
6-step workflow: Define behavior → Model in Conformiq → Export test cases → Insert datasets → Automate → Collaborate
Solves miscommunication, unstable requirements, and regression gaps — all in one model-based approach

title: Motion Design — A Production Guideline
summary: A comprehensive guide to understanding and producing motion design video animations. Covers the end-to-end production workflow — from creative briefs and storyboarding to animation, sound design, and file export — with practical advice on brand consistency, target audience alignment, and visual language definition.
highlights: 8-phase production workflow: Brief → Script → Storyboard → Layout → Animation → Sound → Subtitles → Export
Brand identity alignment guidelines for motion design consistency across projects
Storyboarding best practices: screen sequencing, transition notes, and 10-word rule for on-screen text
Sound design strategy: music, voice-over, and sound effects for social media consumption

title: Venture Capital Annual Review 2023 — The Global Funding Decline
summary: An in-depth analysis of the global venture capital market in 2023, a year marked by significant contraction following record-breaking funding in prior years. Examines how rising interest rates, declining equity markets, and geopolitical uncertainty drove investors toward safer assets — resulting in a 37% year-over-year drop in US investment and the lowest quarterly deal volume in three years.
highlights: US total VC investments reached $144.3B in 2023 — a 37% decline from the previous year
Q4 2023 seed-through-growth rounds hit $29.3B, the lowest quarterly total in three years
Deal volume fell 16% from Q3 and 31% year-over-year, with late-stage rounds hardest hit
Generative AI, cleantech, and biotech remained bright spots amid broad sector contractions
